title: Dynamic Peppery Uruguayan Peanuts Salad
description: A quick, peppery salad featuring spherified peanuts that burst with lime and chili for a keto-friendly weeknight bite.

ingredients.name: calcium chloride solution
ingredients.amount: 100 ml prepared by dissolving 0.25 tsp calcium chloride in 100 ml water

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and spread 100g roasted peanuts on a baking sheet.
Toast peanuts in the oven for 5 minutes until fragrant, then remove and let cool.
While peanuts cool, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, crushed red pepper flakes, salt, garlic powder, and chopped cilantro in a bowl.
Add the cooled peanuts to the dressing and mix until evenly coated.
Dissolve 0.5 tsp sodium alginate in 200 ml cold water using an immersion blender until smooth.
Transfer the peanut mixture into the alginate solution, stirring gently to coat each peanut with the alginate layer.
Prepare a calcium chloride bath by dissolving 0.25 tsp calcium chloride in 100 ml water.
Drop coated peanuts into the calcium chloride bath using a spoon, allowing them to form spherified pearls for 2 minutes.
Remove pearls with a slotted spoon, rinse briefly in cold water, and serve immediately over a bed of lettuce or as a snack.
